[2018-03-19 00:24] http404error: I enjoy having some more breathing room and moving the competitions to weekly. I'd like to encourage people to discuss the posted designs more though!
[2018-03-19 00:25] http404error: There are currently eight entries already!
[2018-03-19 00:26] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Discuss the Ranger, please.
[2018-03-19 00:28] http404error: The command-like phrasing of your request is probably counting against you here.
[2018-03-19 00:28] http404error: Try asking it as a question instead
[2018-03-19 00:28] http404error: Ideally a specific one, so people actually have something to grab onto about the request
[2018-03-19 00:28] redzonex (Redzone): honestly i like the design concept of a unit that attacks for some amount, but can attack for more in exchange for becoming frontline
[2018-03-19 00:29] redzonex (Redzone): but the way this works is way too fiddly
[2018-03-19 00:29] http404error: A frontline switch is definitely novel and could be cool
[2018-03-19 00:29] redzonex (Redzone): i would just make it a permanent frontline so that clicking it is a more serious decision
[2018-03-19 00:29] redzonex (Redzone): (permanent once clicked)
[2018-03-19 00:31] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): It's pretty serious, can't spam Click.
[2018-03-19 00:31] redzonex (Redzone): the unit is too complex
[2018-03-19 00:32] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): No. Turn attack with Click frontline toggle.
[2018-03-19 00:33] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): That it has Supply 4 helps.
[2018-03-19 00:33] redzonex (Redzone): if i cant immediately grok what it does, its too complex
[2018-03-19 00:33] redzonex (Redzone): also your explanations dont exactly help with that
[2018-03-19 00:33] http404error: Yeah, asking for advice isn't going to get you very far if you always just reject it immediately.
[2018-03-19 00:34] http404error: You should listen more and assert less. If your goal in asking for discussion is to stroke your ego rather than improve your designs, you're not going to get very many bites.
[2018-03-19 00:34] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): No, you reject my choice.
[2018-03-19 00:34] http404error: Yes, that is because your assessment is wrong.
[2018-03-19 00:35] http404error: What's the point in asking for input if you only ever think that you are correct?
[2018-03-19 00:37] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): ...That's a horrible bias and fallacy.
[2018-03-19 00:38] iminabearsuit: Unfortunatly everyone I've heard have an opinion on this, agree with 404 in this matter.
[2018-03-19 00:38] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): The converse is true.
[2018-03-19 00:38] mrguy888: You seem to use bias and fallacy as negative buzzwords, not understanding their meaning.
[2018-03-19 00:38] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): 10 people: "This unit is too complex and uses mechanics that aren't obvious"
SSP: "It makes sense to me, everyone else is just blind/biased"
10 people: :NotLikeThis:
[2018-03-19 00:38] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): No, http makes the bias.
[2018-03-19 00:39] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): It is in fact complex.
[2018-03-19 00:40] http404error: The biases that I am leveraging, and which you claim to be free of, are experience and understanding.
[2018-03-19 00:40] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): But the states are similar enough.
[2018-03-19 00:40] http404error: You're not going to succeed in defending your points very well without those two things.
[2018-03-19 00:41] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): So, what's your argument about the matter.
[2018-03-19 00:42] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): It's too complex as to be unwieldy, or it may be reworded.
[2018-03-19 00:43] f300xen (f0x): there should be a rule about having to have had played prismata before posting in this channel
[2018-03-19 00:44] http404error: @f0x That seems overly specific
[2018-03-19 00:44] http404error: It also seems rather fruitless
[2018-03-19 00:44] http404error: Someone could just play one match and qualify
[2018-03-19 00:44] http404error: Or just... say they did.
[2018-03-19 00:44] redzonex (Redzone): ok if we're gonna tear into someone at least don't directly ad hominem
[2018-03-19 00:45] http404error: @f0x Basically all I've ever seen you do in this channel is sling insults. How about you post some unit designs or something more constructive?
[2018-03-19 00:45] redzonex (Redzone): but seriously, the fact that you used the wording "can't click next turn" instead of the already-existing game construct "exhaust 2" implies to me that you dont have enough familiarity with the prismata unit pool and how units are constructed
[2018-03-19 00:45] mrguy888: people have torn into ssp in as many different forms as they have available @Redzone
[2018-03-19 00:46] http404error: I seem to recall you did post at least one for a previous challenge.
[2018-03-19 00:46] redzonex (Redzone): like if everyone feels the need to comment negatively, maybe look in the mirror at what you're doing
[2018-03-19 00:47] mrguy888: If you have that level of awareness you don't hold your 0 minutes of playtime based opinion in such high regard.
[2018-03-19 00:48] mrguy888: And this problem doesn't arise in the first place.
[2018-03-19 00:49] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Turn: Get 3:Attack:.
Click: Toggle :Frontline: on/off, can't :Click: next Turn.
If not :Frontline:, Attack (:Attack:, not :Click:) has 2:Exhaust:.
[2018-03-19 00:50] wilson0862 (Wilson): Can I just say that simplicity is something Lunarch values highly in their units?
[2018-03-19 00:50] redzonex (Redzone): is there even any existing unit in prismata that has an if/then clause
